description_long: This lounge set features a modern, minimalist design with a deep burgundy leather or faux leather upholstery. The arrangement includes a three-seater sofa, a matching armless chaise lounge, and two round black coffee tables placed atop a large rectangular area rug with a striped pattern in neutral tones. The sofa is adorned with three loose cushions—two in a light gray and one in burgundy—providing both comfort and visual contrast. The furniture sits on slender, black metal legs, giving the set a light, elevated appearance. The coffee tables have a glossy black finish and are accessorized with stacked books, adding a touch of sophistication. The overall ensemble is well-suited for upscale urban environments such as lobbies, lounges, or public waiting areas.
description: A modern burgundy lounge set with a three-seater sofa, armless chaise, two round black coffee tables, and a striped area rug. The set features sleek lines, loose cushions, and slender black legs for a contemporary urban look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full sofa, chaise lounge to the left, two round coffee tables, and the striped rug.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the sofa, the armless chaise, and the arrangement of the tables and rug.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the sofa, the chaise on the right, and the coffee tables centered on the rug.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the chaise lounge, the back of the sofa, and the coffee tables with books.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three loose back cushions on the sofa (two gray, one burgundy), no visible seat cushions, and no cushions on the chaise; cushions are rectangular and evenly spaced.
attribute_backrest_design: Straight, medium-height backrest with a flat top and no visible tufting or segmentation; clean, modern lines.
attribute_armrest_presence: Present on the sofa, straight and low-profile, matching the sofa's height and style; absent on the chaise.
attribute_leg_style: Slender, straight black metal legs, medium height, slightly tapered, with a minimalist design and no decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid burgundy upholstery with a smooth, untextured finish; no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
